experience.description: Worked on client websites—QA, UI components, and web forms.
bullets: Conducted QA (regression) testing on 5+ client sites to meet industry best practices, reducing errors by 30%.
Engineered user-centric web forms with HTML, SQL and PHP, coordinating deadlines with a 4-person UX team.
Developed reusable UI, WCAG 2.1 compliant components using Bootstrap principles, reducing build time by 20%.

experience.description: Working in global asset mgmt (GAM) to help maintain applications and build new ones to streamline internal services.
bullets: Upgraded legacy Java services to Spring Boot 4 and Java 25 using AWS SDK v2, improving compatibility with modern cloud integrations.
Increased unit test coverage by 70+% on legacy microservices to over 80%, reducing pipeline scan failures by 30%.
Designed and implemented GitHub Actions CI/CD workflows to automate build, test, and deployment pipelines; integrated sonarqube, Synk and DAST scans.
Utilized OpenShift (OCP) logs and platform tooling to debug and troubleshoot distributed service issues in containerized environments.
Developed Kafka producers and consumers for event-driven services, including designing and evolving Avro schemas and Kafka security with TLS and Kerberos.

experience.description: incoming summer 2026, working on the C1 Travel mobile app!
